metadata.description: Global deterministic JOILang generation rules and schema-faithful behavior.
Main JOILang generator block with deterministic JSON-only output and schema-grounded exemplars.
Targeted repair prompt that fixes schema mismatch, arg typing, and semantic drift with minimal edits.
